_comment: Golden dataset for end-to-end Agent evaluation. Numbers are anchored to MOCK_STOCK_DATA so groundedness checks pass under mock mode. Extend freely — EvalRunner reads this file at runtime, no code changes needed.

cases.description: Simple single-stock price lookup. Expects stock_price tool and the AAPL mock price 182.52 in the answer.
cases.query: What is Apple's current stock price?

cases.description: Simple single-stock price lookup for Tesla.
Simple news search — no specific numbers expected, just tool selection.
Standard: price + financial report for Apple. Expects both tools and AAPL PE ratio 28.5.
cases.query: Analyze Apple stock fundamentals and price.

cases.description: Standard: Tesla price + news + sentiment. TSLA price 248.42, change_percent -1.26.
cases.query: Tesla stock price and recent news sentiment.

cases.description: Standard: Google financial report. GOOGL PE 24.8.
Standard: single-stock research pipeline (price + history + financial + news).
cases.query: Give me a full research report on NVIDIA.

cases.description: Detailed: Apple price + financial + news + analysis. Multiple numbers grounded in mock data.
cases.query: Comprehensive Apple analysis: price, financials, news, and SWOT.

cases.description: Detailed: Tesla deep dive with financial analysis. TSLA PE 62.3.
cases.query: Deep dive Tesla: price, financials, news sentiment, and SWOT analysis.

cases.description: Detailed: cross-stock comparison. Groundedness checks for both AAPL and MSFT prices.
cases.query: Compare Apple and Microsoft stock prices and fundamentals.
